---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a lightweight improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

What feature do you want?

## Use Case

What problem would this solve during champ select, live game, reports, history, GUI, TUI, or overlay use?

## Area

GUI, TUI, overlay, champ select, match history, or reports?

## Lightweight Fit

Why does this belong in a lightweight app instead of a heavier companion tool?

## Privacy or Security Notes

Does this require new data access, network calls, saved data, startup behavior, or permissions?
